ogTitle: Jinghi vs Jobs Gate: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Jinghi and Jobs Gate.
heading: Jinghi vs Jobs Gate — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Jinghi, Queensland and Jobs Gate, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Jobs Gate has a lower overall climate risk score (32/100) compared to Jinghi (43/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Jinghi or Jobs Gate safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Jinghi has a flood risk score of 54/100, while Jobs Gate scores 41/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Jinghi scores 35/100 for bushfire risk. Jobs Gate scores 39/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Jinghi or Jobs Gate?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Jobs Gate has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.93% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
